forecast.name: Overnight
forecast.detailedForecast: Mostly cloudy. Low around 56, with temperatures rising to around 58 overnight. Southwest wind around 5 mph.

forecast.name: Monday
forecast.detailedForecast: Partly sunny. High near 72, with temperatures falling to around 68 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 3 to 10 mph.

weather_report:
As dawn approaches in Downtown San Francisco, a soft veil of clouds hangs overhead, wrapping the city in a cool embrace. The temperatures are gently rising from the mid-50s, creating a tranquil prelude to the day ahead. The Southwest winds whisper through the streets, a calm presence heralding the potential warmth of the afternoon, when the sun will bravely pierce through the cloud cover, reaching a pleasant height of around 72 degrees before settling back down into the 60s as the day wanes.

While the morning may appear subdued, hints of sunlight promise to break through, casting a golden glow upon the iconic landscape. Fog, a familiar companion to these parts, may linger in the distant nooks of the bay, but largely the visibility remains clear. Dressed in layers, a light jacket or sweater offers comfort against pockets of coolness, while breathable fabrics will suit the warming afternoon. This day invites you to explore the hidden corners of the city: perhaps a stroll along the Embarcadero, where the rhythm of the bay meets the energy of morning commuters, or a pause with a warm cup of coffee in a cozy café, allowing the world to unfold at its leisurely pace.
